markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the template gallery MVP for launch and align on the next content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**MVP Launch:** The initial gallery will launch with 7 templates, stripped of navigation, search, and filters to simplify the user experience and accelerate deployment.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [**Next Strategy:** The next content push will target "Portfolio Websites," identified via competitive analysis as the highest-volume keyword category for quick SEO wins.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=2840.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:** A scalable pipeline is required to generate unique content for similar templates (e.g., two food blogs), avoiding repetition and ensuring SEO effectiveness.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [**Tracking:** GSC access for `lovable.dev` is needed to track template performance (clicks, impressions), as the current `lovable.app` domain access is insufficient.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=1858.0)

## Topics

### Template Gallery MVP

  - [**Goal:** Launch the template gallery by Tuesday with a simplified MVP experience.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The full UI (navigation, search) is unnecessary for a small initial set of 7 templates and would delay launch.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [**MVP Scope:**](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=2422.0)
      - [**Remove:** Category navigation bar, search bar, and "Latest/Popular" filters.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=2422.0)
      - [**Keep:** Individual template detail pages for SEO indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=2422.0)
  - [**Content Generation:**](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [**Problem:** Similar templates (e.g., "Culinary Culture" & "Food Stories") require unique content to avoid repetition.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
      - [**Solution:** Use distinct prompts in the content pipeline to generate unique descriptions, highlights, and features.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
      - [**Example Prompts:**](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
          - ["Culinary Culture": Newsletter signup angle for food stories.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
          - ["Food Stories": Traditional recipe blog angle.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)

### Next Content Strategy: Portfolio Websites

  - [**Rationale:** Competitive analysis revealed "Portfolio Websites" as the highest-volume keyword category, offering the best opportunity for early SEO wins.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=2840.0)
  - [**Action:** Prioritize creating templates for this category next week.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=2943.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=2943.0)
      - [**Focus:** Scalability over perfection. The goal is to produce many variations quickly, leveraging the team's established trust in quality.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=3161.0)
      - [**Process:** Define a repeatable page structure (e.g., Home, About, Work, Contact) and use a component-based workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=3095.0)
      - [**Content:** Use high-quality Unsplash collections for images.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=3250.0)
      - [**Credits:** The current 1-2k credit limit is insufficient for this high-volume strategy; unlimited credits are required.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=3307.0)

### Logistics & Blockers

  - [**Lovable Account Credits:** The account is out of credits, blocking new template generation.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
      - [**Workaround:** Georgemaine is using Claude for now.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
      - [**Action:** George Haikal will request more credits from Sebastian.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [**Client Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [**Felix:** Provided minor UI edits (button/icon changes).](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [**Nat:** Requested polish round, but the Loom recording is inaccessible.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
      - [**Action:** Georgemaine will implement Felix's edits and await Nat's feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [**Gallery Access:**](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
      - [**Request:** Cece (CMO) requested the gallery link.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
      - [**Action:** George Haikal will DM Cece the password, per Furkan's security directive to use 1Password for external sharing.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [**Performance Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=1858.0)
      - [**Need:** GSC access for `lovable.dev` to track impressions and clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=1858.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Access to `lovable.app` is insufficient for tracking the `lovable.dev` domain.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=2153.0)
      - [**Action:** George Haikal will request access from Rachel.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=2153.0)
  - [**Meeting Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=3545.0)
      - [**New Time:** Thursdays, to allow for same-day resolution of any client-side blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/hhdgdx_dpeNxoCWGp-XBC7T6hvZQwio-?tab=summary&timestamp=3545.0)
